AuditSink = iobs.AuditSink

AuditSinkFunc = iobs.AuditSinkFunc

CoalesceOptions struct {
	Quiet time.Duration

	MaxLag time.Duration

	SwapHint time.Duration
}

CoalesceProfile = coalesce.Profile

CodecBridge uint8

Defaulter interface {
	Defaults()
}

DiffChange = istate.DiffChange

DiffEntry = istate.DiffEntry

DiffReporterMetricsSink = iobs.DiffReporterMetricsSink

DumpFormat = istate.DumpFormat

FeatureRule = feature.Rule

FieldSpec = pipeline.FieldSpec

	Dir       string
	RegionEnv string
	ZoneEnv   string
	HostEnv   string
	Watch     bool

	CoalesceProfile CoalesceProfile
}

	Dir        string
	ProfileEnv string
	Default    string
	Watch      bool

	CoalesceProfile CoalesceProfile
}

LayerKind = istate.LayerKind

Manager[T any] struct {
	inner *imanager.M[T]
}

MetricsSink = iobs.MetricsSink

MigrationApplier interface {
	Migrate(map[string]any) error
}

MigrationFunc func(map[string]any) error

Option = iopts.Option

Origin = provenance.Origin

OriginIndex = provenance.Index

OverlayAxis struct {
	Dir                 string
	EnvVar              string
	Priority            int
	DefaultFromHostname bool
}

PlanBuilder[T any] struct {
	inner *imanager.PlanBuilder[T]
}

PlanResult[T any] struct {
	Proposed   *State[T]
	Diff       []DiffEntry
	Validators []ValidatorReport
	Policies   []policy.Violation
}

PolicyError = fcerr.PolicyError

ProfileOptions struct {
	Single string

	Multi []string

	Expr string

	EnvVar string

	Default string
}

	inner *imanager.Replay[T]
}

	Dir      string
	HistoryN int
	Watch    bool
	Strict   bool
}

State[T any] istate.State[T]

SubscribeOption[M any] func(*subscribeOpts[M])

TenantManager[T any] struct {
	inner *itenant.Manager[T]
}

TestingOpts struct {
	FS      fs.FS
	Profile string
}

Tracer = iobs.Tracer

Transformer interface {
	Name() string
	Transform(map[string]any) error
}

ValidatorReport = imanager.ValidatorReport

WatchOptions struct {
	Enabled         bool
	Paths           []string
	Coalesce        CoalesceOptions
	CoalesceProfile coalesce.Profile
}

Watcher[T any] struct {
	inner *imanager.Watcher[T]
}
